name: Logo section
description: The logo section showcases a group of related images, such as a group of customer or partner logos. For best results, ensure that the images have identical dimensions.
usage:
The logo section highlights the logo as the primary content. It is typically paired with a muted heading, an optional description, and a CTA block. This pattern is used to emphasize brand identity or partner associations within a page.

### When to use

*   In cases where the logo block functions as the main content, with all other elements acting as supporting content

### When not to use

*   When images, lists, or other content need to be included, use the [Basic section](/basic-section) instead
*   If logos need to be linked, use the [Linked logo section](/linked-logo-section) instead

table.name: Rule
table.description: The rule component indicates the beginning of a new section.

table.name: Heading
table.description: The section heading communicates the primary subject or theme of the section.

table.name: Description
table.description: The description provides introductory context for the section. It appears at the top of the section and helps users understand the purpose or scope of the content before engaging with the logo block.

table.name: CTA block
table.description: The CTA (call to action) block presents one or more related actions that guide the user toward the next step within a section

table.name: Logo block
table.description: The array of related images, such as customer or partner logos.

properties.name: Section rule
properties.description: The rule component indicates the beginning of a new pattern
properties.constraint: Only use the default style for the section-level rule

properties.name: Heading
properties.description: 4-column width H2 heading using muted heading style

properties.name: Linked heading
properties.description: The heading can be used as a link when paired with a chevron(›) and a clear indication.

properties.name: Bottom padding
properties.description: The type of padding applied to the bottom of the pattern

properties.name: Logo block
properties.description: The logo block showcases a group of related images, such as a group of customer or partner logos.
properties.constraint:
Up to 10 logos
Linking individual logos is not allowed

properties.name: Link CTA
properties.description: The text link used for contextual actions or pathways to more information. It uses a chevron (›) to indicate navigation to additional content or pages.

properties.name: Primary CTA
properties.description: The CTA used with the positive button style. It indicates a high-priority, positive action and is reserved for hero areas or other key call-to-action sections.

properties.name: Secondary CTA
properties.description: The CTA using the default button style. It is used for most actions that are positive but not primary, and may serve as the main CTA in non-hero sections.

exceptionFromRules.rule: Section title is styled as H2 or Heading muted
exceptionFromRules.knownExceptionForConstructs: Hero, Blog, Data spotlight, Logo section, Quote wrapper

exceptionFromRules.rule: Headings/titles of sections and blocks can be linked if they follow links rules.
exceptionFromRules.knownExceptionForConstructs: Hero, Data spotlight, Linked logo section, Logo section, Newsletter signup, Pricing block, Quote wrapper, Rich vertical list, Tiered list
